## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — code restructuring, no behaviour change
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — CI, deps, tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](docs/tutorial/04_commit_conventions.md)
- [ ] Tests added / updated for all changed behaviour
- [ ] Docstrings updated for all changed public functions
- [ ] No patient data or large binary files committed
- [ ] CI passes locally (`./scripts/check.sh`)
- [ ] PR is targeted at `develop`, not `main`
